data.current_description: Sets the routing status for the authenticated agent (e.g., accepting_chats, not_accepting_chats).
data.description_suggestion: Sets the routing status for the authenticated agent to control chat assignment eligibility. Accepted statuses include 'accepting_chats' (agent receives new chat assignments) and 'not_accepting_chats' (agent does not receive new assignments). Existing chats are not affected. Returns the updated agent routing status. This status persists until explicitly changed.
